items.title: XGBoost documentation
items.author: XGBoost contributors
items.note: Official API, tree_method options, parameters, and missing-value handling.

items.title: LightGBM documentation
items.author: Microsoft Corporation
items.note: Parameters, leaf-wise growth, categorical features, and GOSS/EFB overview.

items.title: XGBoost: A Scalable Tree Boosting System (KDD 2016)
items.author: Tianqi Chen, Carlos Guestrin
items.note: Original systems paper — sparsity-aware splits, weighted quantile sketch, parallelization.

items.title: LightGBM: A Highly Efficient Gradient Boosting Decision Tree (NIPS 2017)
items.author: Guolin Ke et al.
items.note: Histogram algorithm, leaf-wise growth, GOSS, and EFB.

items.title: Greedy Function Approximation: A Gradient Boosting Machine (2001)
items.author: Jerome H. Friedman
items.note: Foundational gradient boosting — algorithm owned in Gradient Boosting topic.
